content.caption:
🐾 Big news for dog parents everywhere!

We just launched our event calendar across 7 cities worldwide. From pack walks in LA to dog festivals in Tokyo, we're tracking the best dog-friendly events so you never miss out.

📍 7 cities: LA, NYC, London, Tokyo, Paris, Barcelona & Geneva
📅 Updated weekly with new events
🆓 Submit your own events at pawcities.com/events/submit

Know about a dog-friendly event in your city? Drop the details in comments or submit it on our site — our community helps curate the best events for pup parents worldwide.

#PawCities #DogFriendlyEvents #DogFriendlyCity #DogsOfInstagram #DogEvents #PetFriendly #DogCommunity #DogTravel #DogLife

content.caption:
📅 Los Angeles dog event alert!

Spring is here and so is our lineup! 🌸🐾

🗓 May 1
📍 Los Angeles, California

Find this and more dog-friendly events at pawcities.com — your go-to guide for exploring cities with your pup.

@bennyboybrewing @pupculturerescue @bellesbagels @cheftrevpresents

#PawCities #DogEventsLosAngeles #DogFriendlyLosAngeles #DogsOfLosAngeles

content.text:
Hey! 👋 Love what you're doing for the dog community in Tokyo. We're building pawcities.com — a free guide to dog-friendly cities, events, and places around the world. We just featured your events on our Tokyo calendar!

Would love to connect and support each other's communities. Let us know if you have any upcoming events you'd like us to help promote! 🐾

drafts.notes: DM to @sippofesta — high-value event organizer in Tokyo. Send AFTER following + commenting.
